title: Deactivate Riptide Flight
description: Disables flying using trident with riptide enchantment. Riptide enchantment is not removed but have no effect.
body:
![title](https://thanatoros.com/images/deactivateriptideflight/title.png)

Disables flying using trident with riptide enchantment. Riptide enchantment is not removed but have no effect.


![](https://thanatoros.com/images/deactivateriptideflight/faq.png)

### **I have an issue / bug / crash / report / request, where can I contact you about it ?**

Use my Discord server, you can join it by clicking image on the right. [![Foo](https://thanatoros.com/images/mc_images/discord_link_image.png)](https://discord.gg/y366spsSjv)

### **Can I put this mod into my modpack ?**

Yes you can. Would appreciate mention of mod/author/link in modpacks description/credits.

### **Does this mod support servers ?**

Yes it does.
